narrative:
Madison Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,075 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
